title: Triquesta
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/triquesta-pte-ltd/346670373 Triquesta is a Singapore-based fintech company specializing in collateral, compliance, and risk management software for structured commodity finance.Founded by seasoned banking professionals, the firm provides cutting-edge technology that helps global banks and direct lenders reliably track assets and mitigate risks.With a strong international presence across Europe and Australia, their solutions empower financial institutions to navigate complex commodity markets efficiently
